prompt.content:
Calculate the absolute variance between the Book Revenue Realization (Receipts as a % of revenue) and the Tax Revenue Realization for the 2021 and 2022 fiscal years using Trial Balance data and Revenue Timing Adjustments in the filesystem and Bank Transactions data from Xero

Assumptions:
Consider all RECEIVE type transactions with only AUTHORISED status for the respective year.

Present the final absolute variance for each year in %, rounded to two decimal places to the console

rubrics.name: States that the absolute value difference in Book Revenue Realization and the... (ver_ea4166cd89e6494999d61fa93c584b0c)

messages.content: States that the absolute value difference in Book Revenue Realization and the Tax Revenue Realization for the year 2021 is 0.10% (acceptable range 0.099% to 0.10%).

rubrics.name: States that the absolute value difference in Book Revenue Realization and the... (ver_08cb0950a84b4ee2a48eb161d6e175ec)

messages.content: States that the absolute value difference in Book Revenue Realization and the Tax Revenue Realization for the year 2022 is 0.08% (acceptable range 0.079% to 0.081%).

golden_responses.golden_text_response: The absolute variance in revenue realization between book and tax bases was 0.10% for FY2021 and 0.08% for FY2022.
